name: Baked Chicken with Olives
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub 1 teaspoon salt and 1/2 teaspoon pepper over chicken inside and out.
2. Melt the butter, then add the bread crumbs and cook for 3-5 minutes.
3. Add celery, onions, parsley, olives, sage, 1 teaspoon salt, and 1/2 teaspoon pepper to the pan.
4. Stir the mixture until the vegetables are slightly wilted.
5. Add 1/2 cup peach nectar to the mixture.
6. Remove from heat and stuff the chicken with the remaining mixture.
7. Pour the remaining nectar over the chicken.
8. Bake uncovered for 15 minutes or until the chicken is brown.
9. Cover and bake at 350 degrees for 2-1/2 hours or until the chicken is tender.
10. Baste as the chicken cooks.
